body.title: Nightly memory-count snapshot habit
body.result: memory_snapshot.py: nightly count by type, self-gates hour>=22 + once/day stamp, logs to memory_count.log. PROC_MEMORY_COUNT_SNAPSHOT seeded (12h interval). 3 tests pass.
body.description: PROC_ habit that fires nightly (heartbeat_check + time gate: after 22:00, once per day). Counts memories via SELECT COUNT(*) FROM memories, logs (date, count) to ~/.TheIgors/logs/memory_count.log or a dedicated postgres table. Goal: trend tracking — can see if memory base is growing, stagnant, or shrinking. S-size. worker=igor
